narrative_beat: Estante com caixas metalicas etiquetadas por ano — uma caixa entreaberta emite luz dourada

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: top-down view of an archival shelf with metallic file boxes labeled with faint year tags from 2004 to 2024 in aged gold on crimson labels
subject.focal_point: a single ajar box emitting internal golden light revealing a folder inside
subject.secondary: Boxes are lined in chronological order. Dust covers most labels.
props: gold year labels on crimson tags
one ajar box emitting internal light

composition.rule: overhead grid, rule of thirds for ajar box
composition.foreground: labeled boxes in rich gold-crimson tones

lighting.key_light: internal golden light from ajar box
lighting.fill_light: faint cold blue from overhead archive lighting

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: two decades of buried evidence emerging
symbolism.secondary: gold light as truth escaping containment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
